ddls:
CREATE TABLE "codebase" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the codebase */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the codebase */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the codebase */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the codebase was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the codebase was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "module" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the module */,
  "codebase_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the codebase the module belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the module */,
  "path" TEXT /* Path of the module in the codebase */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the module was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the module was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "language" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the language */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the programming language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "defect_type" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the defect type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the defect type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the defect type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "severity_level" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the severity level */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the severity level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the severity level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "defect_status" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the defect status */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the defect status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the defect status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "defect_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each defect data entry */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the module where the defect is located */,
  "line" TEXT /* Line of code where the defect is located */,
  "score" REAL /* Score indicating the likelihood of a defect */,
  "flash_score" REAL /* Flash score indicating the severity of the defect */,
  "fix_freq" INTEGER /* Frequency of fixes for the defect */,
  "block_freq" INTEGER /* Frequency of blocks for the defect */,
  "defect_type_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the defect type */,
  "severity_level_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the severity level */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the defect status */,
  "detected_at" TEXT /* Date and time the defect was detected */,
  "detected_by" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user who detected the defect */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the programming language */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file where the defect is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "defect_recommendation" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the recommendation */,
  "defect_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the defect the recommendation is for */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendation for fixing the defect */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the recommendation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the recommendation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "defect_resolution" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the resolution entry */,
  "defect_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the defect that was resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user who resolved the defect */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Date and time the defect was resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the resolution process */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the resolution entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the resolution entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)
